channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 12.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): No 10 says Starmer ‘will not walk away’ if Burnham officially enters Labour leadership contest - UK politics live
item.description: No 10 says Starmer ‘will not walk away’ if Burnham officially enters Labour leadership contest - UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Lammy hits back at Trump administration’s ‘two-tier policing’ claim over Henry Nowak’s murder
item.description: Lammy hits back at Trump administration’s ‘two-tier policing’ claim over Henry Nowak’s murder

item.title: BBC Politics: Burnham says he would seek to enter any Labour leadership contest
item.description: Burnham says he would seek to enter any Labour leadership contest

item.title: LabourList: Labour should seize the moment in Makerfield
item.description: Labour should seize the moment in Makerfield

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: She rows back and forth so much even in the excerpts in this article that it's clear she's just saying whatever pops into her head and I just want to say "Kemi! This is a country that you want to be prime minister of!...
item.description: She rows back and forth so much even in the excerpts in this article that it's clear she's just saying whatever pops into her head and I just want to say "Kemi! This is a country that you want to be prime minister of!...

item.title: Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: Burnham still wins even if you add the Reform/Restore/Con vote – always clear his personal popularity would be the key factor.
item.description: Burnham still wins even if you add the Reform/Restore/Con vote – always clear his personal popularity would be the key factor.

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: Very impressed by Burnham on that Question Time panel. He said various things I disagreed with of course, but presentationally he's striking: Empathetic, articulate, emotionally and intellectually engaged, with a sens...
item.description: Very impressed by Burnham on that Question Time panel. He said various things I disagreed with of course, but presentationally he's striking: Empathetic, articulate, emotionally and intellectually engaged, with a sens...

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): It’s a washout: fighters pull their punches in Question Time’s Makerfield match-off
item.description: It’s a washout: fighters pull their punches in Question Time’s Makerfield match-off

item.title: Reuters: Japan could end up an 'AI colony' if it falls behind, digital minister warns - Reuters
item.description: Japan could end up an 'AI colony' if it falls behind, digital minister warns - Reuters

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer can survive a leadership challenge, says attorney general
item.description: Starmer can survive a leadership challenge, says attorney general
